LanguageData.CS_PawnFlightTravelling.label: Flying Character
LanguageData.CS_PawnFlightTravelling.description: A character flying through the air.
LanguageData.CS_PawnFlightWaiting.label: Flying Character (Awaiting Landing)
LanguageData.CS_PawnFlightWaiting.description: A character that has arrived above the destination, awaiting landing orders.
